title: 99% of Claude Users Have No Idea They Can Build This #claude #aitools #freetools
summary: A video demonstrates a real-time 3D clay sculpting web application built in Claude. The application uses MediaPipe Hand Landmarker for hand tracking and Three.js for 3D rendering, delivered as a single self-contained HTML file that requires no installation and runs directly in a browser.
